articles.title: Small modular reactor stocks stir as AI data centers scramble for baseload power
articles.snippet: NuScale Power (SMR) - the only NRC-approved small modular reactor designer - is drawing early attention as AI data centers hunt for reliable, carbon-free baseload power. Still well under the radar versus the megacap nuclear names, with advanced dialogue reported with prospective data-center customers.
